clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: Uses permitted in the R-4 Zone, subject to the Regulations for Permitted Uses for the R-4 Zone;
Uses permitted in the Institutional (I) Zone, subject to the Regulations for permitted uses for the I Zone;
Commercial Uses permitted in the ER-Mixed Use Village Centre Zone (ER-MUVC);
Retail Store with connected Retail Warehouse, Light Manufacturing or assembly facility;

map_references_raw.text_raw: Current zoning map raster package represented in PostGIS-compatible spatial artifacts.

Lot Frontage (Minimum) Corner Lot 20 m (65.6 ft)
